query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app_acessos_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  appId INT NOT NULL,
  usuarioId INT,
  codigoAcessoId INT,
  tipoAcesso ENUM('codigo', 'email', 'link_magico') NOT NULL,
  ip VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  sucesso BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  motivoFalha VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (appId) REFERENCES apps(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (usuarioId) REFERENCES app_usuarios(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (codigoAcessoId) REFERENCES app_codigos_acesso(id)
);
